# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: linkerd.io/api/policy/v1beta1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-serviceaccount
  namespace: <namespace>
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/api/policy/v1beta1
kind: Policy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <namespace>
spec:
  default:
    authn:
      mode: STRICT
    authz:
      mode: ALLOW
    destination:
      port:
        name: <port>
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/api/policy/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <namespace>
spec:
  destination:
    port:
      name: <port>
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/api/policy/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <namespace>
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - {}
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/api/policy/v1beta1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: linkerd-networkpolicy
  namespace: <namespace>
spec:
  ingress:
  - {}
  egress:
  - {}
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/api/policy/v1beta1
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <namespace>
spec:
  selector: {}
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
